fields.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Create tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh with a single structural boundary test (Rule 5 compliant) that FAILS RED before consumer_completeness is added to scope.md.

Placement: tests/scripts/ (matching existing scope.md tests test-isolation-rule-no-unscoped-export.sh and test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh)

Single test function test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts checks BOTH count assertions (only one RED marker needed):
- Count lines matching '^| [a-z_]' in scope.md → assert = 4 (currently 3, RED)
- Count lines matching '^\s\+"[a-z_]*":' in scope.md → assert = 4 (currently 3, RED)
  NOTE: MUST use '^\s\+' (one-or-more spaces) NOT '^\s*' (zero-or-more) — \s* would count 'dimensions:' wrapper key at col 0
Fail with actual counts if either is wrong.

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh following pattern of test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
2. Implement test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts() with both count assertions
3. chmod +x tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
4. Add a NEW SEPARATE LINE to .test-index for the RED marker (do NOT append to line 316 or line 249):
   Add line: plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md:tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh [test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts]
   This temporarily creates a 3rd entry for scope.md (RED marker on own line is the correct format per existing .test-index convention)
5. Verify bash tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exits non-zero (RED)

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh: create (new test file)
- .test-index: add new line (3rd entry for scope.md, temporary RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: [ -x tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh ]
- [ ] test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts function exists (single function, both assertions)
  Verify: grep -q 'test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts' tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
- [ ] .test-index has new RED marker line for test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh \[test_scope_reviewer_dimension_counts\]' .test-index
- [ ] RED confirmation: test file exits non-zero before scope.md changes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
